## Proposed API

<!-- Sketch the API you'd expect across languages, even if rough. -->

```python
# Python
handle.new_service.do_thing(...)
```

```cpp
// C++
ctx->new_service().do_thing(...);
```

```rust
// Rust
ctx.new_service().do_thing(...).await?;
```
